zh.lifeSummary: 當Llywelyn Ap Ifor Lord of St. Clear manor於大約1282年出生在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾聖 可利阿斯時，他的父親Ifor ap Llywelyn35歲，母親Tangwystl ferch Rhys33歲。他於1322年與Angharad verch Morgan在威爾士卡馬特史爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1362年在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根馬福享年82歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾特雷德加。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Llywelyn Ap Ifor Lord of St. Clear manor于大约1282年出生在英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾聖 可利阿斯时，他的父亲Ifor ap Llywelyn35岁，母亲Tangwystl ferch Rhys33岁。他于1322年与Angharad verch Morgan在威尔士卡馬特史爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1362年在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根馬福享年82岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾特雷德加。

nameMeanings.name: Ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Ifor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: (i) relationship name from Old Scandinavian Ívarr, Iwar, Ivar ‘yew-army’. (ii) relationship name, possibly from the Welsh male given name Ifor; if so, it is not clear that it survives today.

variants.name: Ivers
meanings: Irish: from Ó hÍomhair, ‘descendant of Íomhar’, a Gaelic form of the Old Norse personal name Ívarr (see Iverson 2), with excrescent English -s. It is occasionally Anglicized as Howard . Also a shortened form of Mac Íomhair ‘son of Íomhar’, with excrescent English -s. See McIver .
North German: patronymic from the personal name Ivar (see Iversen ).

English: variant of Iver, with post-medieval excrescent -s, a habitational name from Iver (Buckinghamshire) named from Old English ȳfre ‘edge or brow of a hill, tip of a promontory’, or from a minor place called with the same word.

variants.name: Iver
meanings: 1 English: locative name from Iver (Bucks) named from Old English * ȳfre ‘edge or brow of a hill, tip of a promontory’, or from a minor place named with the same word.
2 Scottish: (i) relationship name, reduced form of Irish and Scottish Gaelic Mac Íomhair, see McIvor . (ii) relationship name from the Old Scandinavian personal name Ivar; see Ivor .

variants.name: Iverson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Iver, Erik, Hjalmer, Lars, Selmer, Thor, Evald, Gunner, Helmer, Ingman, Jarl, Joneen.
Americanized form of Norwegian, Danish, and North German Iversen and of Swedish Ivarsson (see Ivarson ), all cognates of 2 below.

English (Kent and London): patronymic from Old Norse Ívarr, Iwar, Ivar, a compound of either ív ‘yew tree, bow’ or Ing (the name of a god) + ar ‘warrior’ or ‘spear’. Alternatively, the name might be a patronymic from the Welsh male personal name Ifor, itself from British Celtic Iūdomāros ‘lord’ + ‘great’, but if so, it is not clear that it survives today.

nameMeanings.name: Llywelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Llewelyn
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

en.lifeSummary: When Llywelyn Ap Ifor Lord of St. Clear manor was born about 1282, in St Clears, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Ifor ap Llywelyn, was 35 and his mother, Tangwystl ferch Rhys, was 33. He married Angharad verch Morgan in 1322, in Carmarthenshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died about 1362, in Mawr, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 82, and was buried in Tredegar, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Llywelyn Ap Ifor Lord of St. Clear manor est né environ 1282, à St Clears, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ifor ap Llywelyn, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Tangwystl ferch Rhys, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Angharad verch Morgan en 1322, à Carmarthenshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé environ 1362, à Mawr, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterré à Tredegar, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Llywelyn Ap Ifor Lord of St. Clear manor um 1282 in St Clears, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ifor ap Llywelyn 35 und seine Mutter Tangwystl ferch Rhys 33. Er hat 1322 in Carmarthenshire, Wales Angharad verch Morgan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb um 1362 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Mawr, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Tredegar, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Llywelyn Ap Ifor Lord of St. Clear manorが約1282年にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアスト クレアルズで生まれた時，父Ifor ap Llywelynは35歳，母Tangwystl ferch Rhysは33歳であった。1322年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアでAngharad verch Morganと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は約1362年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンマウルで82歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアトレデガーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Llywelyn Ap Ifor Lord of St. Clear manor(이)가 대략 1282년 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 스트 클리르스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ifor ap Llywelyn(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Tangwystl ferch Rhys(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1322년 웨일스 카마테실르에서 Angharad verch Morgan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1362년 영국 웨일스 글램르건 마르에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 트레데가에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Llywelyn Ap Ifor Lord of St. Clear manor nasceu aproximadamente 1282, em St Clears, Carmarthenshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ifor ap Llywelyn, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Tangwystl ferch Rhys, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Angharad verch Morgan em 1322, em Carmarthenshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Llywelyn Ap Ifor Lord of St. Clear manor родился около 1282 г. в местности ст клирс, кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ifor ap Llywelyn было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Tangwystl ferch Rhys, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Angharad verch Morgan в 1322 г. в местности кармартеншир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер около 1362 г. в местности мар, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 82 лет и был похоронен в местности тредегар, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания.
